auth.label: API Key
auth.description: PostGrid Verify API key sent with the x-api-key request header. Create or copy it from your PostGrid dashboard: https://dashboard.postgrid.com/

actions.name: autocomplete_address
actions.description: Autocomplete a partially specified US or Canadian address with optional location filters.

partialStreet.description: The partially written street address to autocomplete.

index.description: The optional completion result index to retrieve.

pcFilter.description: Only return addresses within this postal or ZIP code.

cityFilter.description: Only return addresses from this city.

stateFilter.description: Only return addresses within this state or province.

countryFilter.description: Only return addresses within this country.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for autocompleting a partially specified US or Canadian address.

status.description: The status returned by PostGrid Verify.

message.description: The message returned by PostGrid Verify.

address.description: The completed address details returned by PostGrid.

items.description: A validation message returned by PostGrid Verify.

additionalProperties.description: The validation messages for one field.

errors.description: Field-level validation errors returned by PostGrid Verify.

outputSchema.description: The address autocomplete response from PostGrid.

actions.name: lookup_city_state_from_postal
actions.description: Look up city and state or province matches for a postal or ZIP code with PostGrid Verify.

postalOrZip.description: The postal or ZIP code used for the lookup.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for looking up city and state or province values from a postal code.

status.description: The status returned by PostGrid Verify.

message.description: The message returned by PostGrid Verify.

city.description: The city name corresponding to the postal or ZIP code.

provinceOrState.description: The state or province corresponding to the postal or ZIP code.

items.description: One city and state or province match.

data.description: The matching city and state or province records.

outputSchema.description: The postal lookup response from PostGrid.

actions.name: parse_address
actions.description: Parse a single-line address into component fields with PostGrid Verify.

address.description: The address to parse on a single line.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for parsing a single-line address.

status.description: The status returned by PostGrid Verify.

message.description: The message returned by PostGrid Verify.

unit.description: The apartment, suite, or secondary unit designator.

near.description: The nearby location reference from the input query.

data.description: The parsed address components returned by PostGrid.

outputSchema.description: The parsed address response from PostGrid.

actions.name: verify_address
actions.description: Verify and standardize a US or Canadian address with PostGrid Verify using either freeform or structured address input.

address.description: The freeform address written on a single line.

line1.description: The first line of a structured address.

line2.description: The optional second line of a structured address.

city.description: The city name for a structured address.

provinceOrState.description: The state or province code for a structured address.

postalOrZip.description: The ZIP or postal code for a structured address.

country.description: The ISO 2-letter country code for a structured address.

includeDetails.description: Whether to include additional address details in the response.

geocode.description: Whether to include latitude and longitude data in the response.

properCase.description: Whether to return address fields in proper case.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for verifying and standardizing a US or Canadian address.

status.description: The status returned by PostGrid Verify.

message.description: The message returned by PostGrid Verify.

line2.description: The second address line when present.

city.description: The city of the verified address.

provinceOrState.description: The state or province of the verified address.

postalOrZip.description: The postal or ZIP code of the verified address.

country.description: The country code of the verified address.

items.description: A validation message returned by PostGrid Verify.

additionalProperties.description: The validation messages for one field.

errors.description: Field-level validation errors returned by PostGrid Verify.

data.description: The verified address details returned by PostGrid.

outputSchema.description: The address verification response from PostGrid.
